name: Section XI Repeal
content:
**Section XI Repeal**

Section XI Repeal 139. Repeal 139.1 With the issue of these Directions, the instructions/guidelines contained in the following circulars/Directions issued by the Reserve Bank, stand repealed (list as provided below). All approvals/acknowledgements given under circulars/Directions mentioned above shall be deemed as given under these Directions. Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken/purported to have been taken or initiated under the instructions/guidelines having repealed shall continue to be guided by the provisions of said instructions/guidelines.
